# Cross-Repo Status Dashboard

## Task
Show comprehensive overview: active changes, task progress, linking status, recent archives, contract spec state.

## Steps
1. Read both repos' openspec/ state (specs, changes, archives)
2. Cross-reference changes by change-id
3. Read contract spec
4. Present visual dashboard showing per-repo state, linked changes, and attention items
